recentTweets.text: Corporal Nars Desautel has devoted his life to our great country and state. From serving in the Army during World War II to working in the Forest Service to care for Idaho’s public lands, Nars always puts others first. I’m proud to recognize Nars as an Idaho Service Spotlight https://t.co/SOfhC7lgwq

Idahoans understand Idaho’s environment best. Thanks to our commonsense, science-driven approach, grizzly bear populations have recovered in the Gem State. Increasing state authority to manage grizzly bears advances that mission and roots out bureaucratic inefficiencies.

Vicki and I are saddened to hear about the passing of Senator Lindsey Graham. Lindsey was a dear friend and colleague whose warmth, humor, and unwavering dedication to public service will be deeply missed. He loved America deeply and devoted his life to serving our nation and

It was an honor to attend the Warhawk Air Museum’s Kilroy Coffee Klatch yesterday and celebrate the Borbonus Family Foundation’s generous $500,000 gift. This grant continues Private First Class John Borbonus’ legacy and will allow the Warhawk to preserve military and veteran https://t.co/AaT3bPwHnd

Another major milestone for Idaho and American nuclear leadership! As the third reactor to go critical at the @INL this year, Aalo-X is reinforcing Idaho’s central role in the new era of nuclear innovation. Congratulations to INL and the Aalo Atomics team on their successful

Vicki and I welcomed Idahoans and people from across the country at the Idaho booth at the @Freedom250 Great American State Fair today. It was a pleasure to share our love for Idaho’s culture, agriculture, public lands, and innovation. Happy 250 to all!! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/tBkdm0d21x

Happy Independence Day! Today we celebrate 250 years of American excellence. Thanks to the bravery and sacrifice of those who fought for our freedoms, we live in the greatest nation on Earth. God Bless America 🇺🇸 https://t.co/AiZT1kWKZg
Happy Idaho Statehood Day! Vicki and I are so blessed to live in Idaho and work everyday to keep this beautiful state strong. https://t.co/Aou5TrK0hW

Around St. Maries, Hank Thornton is a legend. An Air Force veteran, Hank led the effort to establish the Veterans Outreach Center of Benewah County in 2018. Nearly a decade later, the Center is a lifeline for local veterans—providing mental health support, hot meals, and so much https://t.co/o7yHnI91OC
Happy 136th birthday to Idaho! From Bonners Ferry to Bear Lake, the Gem State is the best state in the nation, and I am proud to call it home. https://t.co/UpYOxvoGz7

Idaho is strong because of the people who call it home. Today, I’m launching the Idaho Service Spotlight to honor these outstanding Idahoans and shine a light on those making a difference in our communities. Know an Idahoan who deserves recognition? Nominate them by contacting https://t.co/li96Zff0yI

Once again, the Gem State and @INL are leading the way in nuclear innovation! Ahead of the July 4th goal, America’s third advanced nuclear microreactor has gone critical. Congratulations to Deployable Energy’s team at INL for achieving this historic feat.

A MAJOR victory for women and the Gem State! Idaho was the FIRST to pass a law protecting women’s sports and defend the promise of Title IX. Today, the Supreme Court upheld our law – ensuring our daughters and granddaughters have the fair, level playing field they deserve. https://t.co/zzyCB3Uduu

🚨Idaho College Students🚨Interested in serving your community and learning about Congress? Come intern in my Washington, D.C. office this fall! Apply today at https://t.co/a7rX2ZTtsq https://t.co/aVcjl2IguQ

The Supreme Court is due to decide its case on Idaho’s law banning men from women’s sports any day now. This commonsense law ought to be upheld under Title IX. I look forward to the decision and continuing our work to ensure fairness in female athletics. https://t.co/nYXVgUqHgY

As the birthplace of nuclear electricity and the site of the first advanced microreactor to go critical in 50 years, @INL is leading the way to quadruple U.S. nuclear capacity by 2050. Great to have @SecretaryWright in Idaho, the heart of nuclear energy innovation!

Great meeting with some of Idaho’s outstanding National Guardsmen serving in our nation’s capital as we prepare to celebrate the 250th anniversary of America’s founding. To the brave men and women who stand Always Ready, Always There, thank you for your service, sacrifice, and https://t.co/twiOBHcA34

Today marks 54 years of Title IX — a historic law that promised equal opportunities for every American woman and girl. More than half a century later, those protections are still under threat. I’m proud to stand up for Title IX and fight to ensure women and girls have the level

Happy Father’s Day! There is no greater blessing than family and fatherhood.

Thank you to all the dads who work hard each day to support, care for, and prepare their children for bright future!

Idaho’s sugar beet farmers are facing significant challenges due to unfair trade practices. While in Jerome, I met with local growers at Henry Farms to discuss my efforts to protect Idaho’s sugar beet industry and strengthen the domestic sugar industry for years to come. https://t.co/cfQm0YtL0f

Idaho is home to over 12,000 veteran-owned businesses and is more than deserving of its own Veterans Business Outreach Center. Our veterans should be served by Idahoans, not an office in another state. I am requesting @SBA_Kelly establish a center in Idaho to provide our veterans

This is great news for Idaho’s ranchers. Expanding grazing on National Forest Land is commonsense. It will strengthen food security, support Idaho’s rural communities, and keep our working lands working.

Reliable water systems are vital to all Idahoans, especially our farmers and ranchers. At Shoshone Falls, I met with some Magic Valley’s water users to discuss everything from supporting the Snake River dams to canal modernization. https://t.co/W9n697LoFk

For more than 250 years, the brave men and women of the U.S. Army have answered the call to protect and defend our great country. We honor their sacrifice and dedication today, and every day. https://t.co/uXl2Idpzl0

The American Flag is a symbol of our nation’s remarkable history and the freedoms we hold dear. During the 250th celebration of our nation’s founding join me in honoring our flag and the values it represents. God Bless America 🇺🇸 https://t.co/8RpeEGq1rR
On Women Veterans Recognition Day, I am proud to honor the brave Idaho women who answered the call to serve our nation. Your strength and sacrifice is an inspiration to all Americans.

The Gem State is full of businesses who keep the spirit of Idaho alive and fuel our economy. Today, Support Local Gems is an opportunity for Idahoans across the state to shop small and give back to the businesses that make Idaho a great place to live! #supportlocalgems https://t.co/gUhq35lnpC

RT @IdahoCommerce: Today’s the day! 

Make a plan to buy from your favorite small business and #SupportLocalGems:

🎁 Buy a gift card to you…

There are so many ways to #supportlocalgems! Join me tomorrow, June 12th, in recognizing Idaho’s small businesses by eating at your favorite restaurant, picking up a sweet treat, shopping at a local storefront, or sharing a positive review online. https://t.co/uQt6di1VVj

Tucked away in Idaho’s Salmon-Challis National Forest, Ram’s Head Café and Lodge was brought back to life by Chris and Brianna Reece after 15 years of lying vacant. Now, the new-and-improved business has become a favorite spot for locals and visitors alike. #SupportLocalGems https://t.co/Prc28PHA2P

RT @IdahoCommerce: Small businesses employ hundreds of thousands of Idahoans. 

Tomorrow, June 12, #SupportLocalGems and the Idahoans they…

New York Pizza Department has served authentic style pizza to Post Falls residents for years. With a passion for community and good food, Michael Kuipers continues the store’s charitable work by giving back to North Idaho first responders, local schools and educators. https://t.co/iEguryvMcn
Have a local small business or restaurant you love? This Friday, show your appreciation by giving them your business or writing them a review! #supportlocalgems https://t.co/hxqolxsteq

In 2018, Magic Valley native Travis Dixon set out to get more local goods on Gem State dinner tables. Now with successful online and Twin Falls storefronts, Meat and Potato Company delivers high-quality Idaho meats and produce straight to customers doors across the country. https://t.co/mpV1xfOlgT

Started by Eric Schrader in 1991, Junkyard Jeans has been a Boise fixture for more than 30 years. Partnering with Idaho craftsman to perfect the old-school style of chainstitching and embroidery, Eric has taken his passion for American-made denim nationwide. #supportlocalgems https://t.co/xoynyCVOme

Idaho’s main street entrepreneurs are like no other and drive the small businesses that fuel our economy. Join me this Friday in thanking these Idahoans for all they do for the Gem State and #supportlocalgems https://t.co/kqY0y9Fc2j

Located in historic downtown Blackfoot, The Candy Jar is a beloved favorite of locals and visitors alike. Owned by Judy and Paul Loomis, The Candy Jar is stocked full of the couple’s homemade fudge and sweets created with Gem State products. #supportlocalgems https://t.co/mlmzI9tB8a

The Blue Fox Theatre in Grangeville has served North Central Idaho since 1930. Now, almost 100 years later, Cory and Haley Koole are keeping the historic business’ legacy alive while giving back to their local community. #supportlocalgems https://t.co/5J0MA9Me3U
RT @IdahoCommerce: Join Idaho Commerce and @SenatorRisch to #SupportLocalGems on Friday, June 12. This all-day celebration is an opportunit…

Today, I am launching my seventh annual Support Local Gems initiative! This Friday, June 12, join me in shopping local and supporting the small businesses that keep Idaho running. #supportlocalgems https://t.co/L7aUjKBT52

Today marks 83 years since the Allied forces landed in Normandy and altered the course of World War II. On the anniversary of D-Day, we honor and remember the brave soldiers who fought and made the ultimate sacrifice for freedom. https://t.co/KV8MWg4WNc

Our veterans are the best of us: dedicated, patriotic, selfless, and much more. I was honored to join the Nampa American Legion chapter for coffee to hear about their service and discuss my work to bolster veteran benefits for the men, women, and families who defended our https://t.co/PIikAbIVoY
Congratulations to the Antares team at @INL! We are well on our way to powering the future with new nuclear energy! https://t.co/T9Mq9wajWK

A historic day for Idaho and America. Today, the first nuclear reactor of its kind in nearly 50 years achieved criticality at @INL. This is just the beginning for a new era of advanced nuclear reactors that will power our future, and Idaho is leading the charge.

Idaho is home to more than 200,000 small businesses that drive our state’s economy. I was honored to join Idaho small business owners in Twin Falls last week to discuss the issues they face and how we can support their ability to grow and thrive in the Gem State. https://t.co/syE8XzpXYT

Happy National DRAM Day! Dynamic Random Access Memory revolutionized computing and helped create the digital age we live in today. Idaho’s own @MicronTech plays a pivotal role in manufacturing this critical technology right here in the Gem State. https://t.co/YAMNCssMM8
A level playing field is necessary to ensure that Gem State sugar production remains strong. I support an investigation into the unfair trade practices that are impacting Idaho’s sugarbeet farmers.

Vicki and I are praying for the law enforcement officers who were injured responding to the brush fire in Mountain Home this morning. Their quick response and heroism was vital in containing this fire and keeping the community safe. 
https://t.co/eaRJjgIZdG

On Memorial Day, we remember the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom. May we never forget their heroism and courage and always stand with the loved ones left behind. https://t.co/jdANCUef3k

Idaho is the birthplace of nuclear generated electricity – and a driving force in keeping the U.S. a leader in this near limitless source of energy. I introduced the ARC Act to earlier this year to bolster our efforts and help kickstart the production of new commercial nuclear

Idaho is full of veterans who put it all on the line for the good of our country. In Congress, I’m leading the charge to strengthen veteran benefits and show our gratitude to those who dutifully served our nation.
https://t.co/sdZqyP95Qh

Public lands are central to Idaho’s way of life. I am proud to cosponsor the America the Beautiful Act to address much-needed improvements on our public lands and keep them strong for generations of Idahoans to enjoy. https://t.co/Lz3BYs8ZFH
Vicki and I are praying for the safety of all crew members involved in today’s crash at Mountain Home AFB. We are grateful for the quick arrival of our medical teams and first responders.

Dirk Kempthorne dedicated his life to serving Idaho and America. I was honored to know Dirk, call him a friend, and join Idahoans in remembering his incredible legacy this week. Esto Perpetua, my dear friend. https://t.co/OCwQfGWihb

On Armed Forces Day, we thank and celebrate the brave men and women across our six branches of military. We are forever grateful to them for unwavering commitment and sacrifice to our great nation. https://t.co/2T4aN2o2oC

It is impossible to ever thank our veterans enough for their service to our nation. I sat down with KTVB in Boise to discuss some of the ways I’m working to strengthen the benefits and resources Idaho’s veterans and military families earned and rightfully deserve. https://t.co/sdJeMjUwIT

As National Police Week comes to an end, we take today to honor our peace officers who gave their lives in service to our communities. May we always remember their courage, service, and dedication to protecting others. https://t.co/rzY0QkXarc

This is great news for Idaho families. I’m proud to have passed my BUST Fentanyl Act into law last year to strengthen our crack down on illicit fentanyl crossing our borders and will continue fighting to keep our communities free of this deadly drug. https://t.co/ig4tND3wPU
